error_signature: Tunnel URL overrides custom webhook URL
title: Custom webhook URL not used with --tunnel flag
symptom: When starting n8n with the --tunnel flag, it generates a tunnel URL instead of using the specified custom webhook URL.
root_cause: The --tunnel flag forces n8n to generate a public tunnel URL for webhooks, which overrides any custom webhook URL specified in the environment variables.
fix_steps: Remove the --tunnel flag from the pm2 start command
Ensure the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable is set correctly
Restart the n8n process in pm2
agent_instruction: Start n8n without the --tunnel flag to use your custom webhook URL.
